name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Let’s Close Biden’s Open Borders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK
body:
Friends, Predictably, the Biden Administration’s plan to give amnesty and citizenship to more than 11 million illegal immigrants has created a crisis at the southern border.

| | Friends-

Predictably, the Biden Administration’s plan to give amnesty and citizenship to more than 11 million illegal immigrants has created a crisis at the southern border.

Thousands of migrants are surging across the border and making it impossible for U.S. Customs and Border Protection to keep up.

Now, there are reports that Border Protection has caught thousands of convicted criminals, gang members and even wanted terrorists using the Biden Administration’s border crisis as cover to enter our country.

---

| | Joe Biden is reversing all the progress President Trump made fighting illegal immigration and securing our border.

Radical policies like Biden’s plan to give amnesty and even U.S. citizenship to illegal aliens has acted like a magnet—incentivizing tens of thousands of people to illegally enter our country.

This can’t continue. We have to stop the Biden immigration plan and defend our border, just like President Trump did.

[I’ll continue to push for policies that will secure our border and stop illegal immigration. Please support my efforts by contributing today.](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbSUyRm5pY29sZW1hbGxpb3Rha2lzJTJGZW1haWwlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEYXBwZWFsJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNEQmlkZW5zJTJCT3BlbiUyQkJvcmRlcnMlMkJFbWFpbA==&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=463A650A1A9033)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of Mar. 22: Stop corrupt politicians, keep the filibuster & more
body:
| |
---
With Biden in the White House and the Democrats in control of Washington, D.C., we have a lot of work to do each week.

This week, we are calling the Senate, emailing corporations that oppose honest elections, fighting against earmarks, and more. See below for details, and have a great week!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Call Your Senators
Call both of your Senators, whether Republican or Democrat, and convey the following messages during the phone call.

**1\. Tell them to vote no on S. 1, or as we call it, the Corrupt Politicians Act.** You can simply call and tell them that, or if you’d like more background information first, [read through a summary of this monstrosity on our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC1jb3JydXB0LXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zLz9taWQ9NDM1MzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=l7JAxob6AVcf5c6S5wmydQ) and our [how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzUzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=AYchYQkR6vMMR_szaqcmjQ).

Key Messaging for when you call, write, or post about this bill:
* You want honest elections, and S. 1 will result in the opposite of honest elections
* You want to make it easy to vote, but hard to cheat
* You want strong safeguards and ballot protections
* Protecting the right to vote is about more than casting ballots, it is about protecting a fair and honest election system that ensures every lawful ballot is counted, and guards against voter fraud

We will have more messaging available soon on the [action page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC1jb3JydXB0LXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zLz9taWQ9NDM1MzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1neqVcAzuk5nBQ8aZ3frFw), so check back often. Note that the House has already passed their own version, and the Senate is set to hold the hearing on their version on March 24th. So we need lots of calls into the Senate especially on Tuesday and Wednesday of this week.

**2\. Tell them to oppose any efforts to change or get rid of the filibuster.** Remember, the Senate was created to be a slower, more deliberative body than the House. This is why the terms are six years instead of two, and why originally the state legislatures – not voters – chose the Senators. And while the filibuster is not something that is in the Constitution, it’s one of the last remaining structures in place that helps differentiate the Senate from the House.

Some Senators are very protective of this idea that the Senate is more a more serious, deliberative body than the House, and may be receptive to this kind of messaging, that getting rid of the filibuster or weakening it will just turn the Senate into another version of the House.

**Bonus Action Item:**
If you have time, please call Sen. Joe Manchin (D-WV) and Sen. Kyrsten Sinema (D-AZ), even if you don’t live in their states, and tell them both to vote against S.1 and oppose any efforts to change or eliminate the filibuster.
[FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1MzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIw&K=mQBkDfIY5pRLOhSTlUkbSg)
|
---
In just under two months, some Americans who voted for Joe Biden are already beginning to regret it...

Why? Because not only have his irresponsible policies and rhetoric lead to a crisis at the Southern Border, his White House is evading questions around it and has put a gag-order of sorts on border patrol agents.

NBC News ran a massive story on this on March 17th with the headline, “Biden administration limits what Border Patrol can share with media about migrant surge at the border.” The story went on to say, “restrictions on what border agents can share with the media were passed down verbally, say officials. Some have released videos of the border surge anyways. ”

And we are thankful that they have defied such tyrannical orders, because the American people deserve the truth...

This is no longer just the Biden Border Crisis, this is the Biden Border Cover-Up. The Biden Administration took a play from Andrew Cuomo’s COVID playbook and attempted to cover-up a massive problem that they created. As the Biden Border Crisis rages on, the American people must demand transparency. Every American, left, right and center, should’ve learned their lesson with Andrew Cuomo.

Who knows though... just like Andrew Cuomo, “elites” may award Biden an Emmy for his cover-up as well.
|
---
Sign Up for Issue-Specific Working Groups
We are launching our Election Integrity working group and our Immigration working group, and want you to be a part of them, based on your interests. We want people to be able to work on the issues they are most passionate about, and to have the opportunity to focus on and learn more about those issues.

**[Sign up for the Election Integrity working group](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZzRMNTVhYnFwZ3FVSDhQRzg_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=iNleDkL_80rT4iNg7lzkTg)**
**[Sign up for the Immigration working group](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvMkg5TGh1c2dNNWRHOXhZcjY_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=jQ4AKmXnH57jNstu0oif5g)**
|

Gas prices continue to rise and it’s Joe Biden’s fault.

While Democrats and the Mainstream Media scramble to make-up excuses about the rise in energy prices, we all know exactly who deserves the blame...

Joe Biden, with the help of congressional Democrats, has pushed radical “progressive” energy pipe-dreams, that have had disastrous consequences.

From killing the Keystone Pipeline to suspending the issuance of oil and gas permits on federal lands and waters, the Biden Administration has taken direct aim at American energy independence.

This, of course, has resulted in a rise in energy prices, and the American people are paying the price at the gas pump.

Florida Senator Rick Scott took aim at Biden’s disastrous actions last week saying, he’s “not thinking” about poor families.

**[Fox Business has the full story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL3NoYXJwLXJpc2UtaW4tZ2FzLXByaWNlcy1kdWUtdG8tYmlkZW5zLWVuZXJneS1hY3Rpb25zLWZsb3JpZGEtc2VuLXJpY2stc2NvdHQ_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=60kaGLg1T0_raHHNDwMReQ)**

Sign the Letter Opposing Earmarks

If you’d like to send a letter to your Representative asking them to sign the pledge, simply [go to our website and sign onto the letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=tD84PN03hLWHal6Jr2ob3w). Then, ask others to do the same on social media or via email.
[SIGN THE LETTER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=TaUi3h7JWjG9qE1LpVL4qQ)
|

Last week, something we had warned about since Joe Biden declared his candidacy became a reality...

Joe Biden is, reportedly, preparing to push for the first major tax hike in a generation.

To pay for his out-of-control spending packages, Biden is expected to raise taxes on all Americans by nullifying the Trump Tax Cuts and much more.

**[Breitbart News has a full break down.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS9wb2xpdGljcy8yMDIxLzAzLzE1L3JlcG9ydC1qb2UtYmlkZW4tcGxhbnMtZmlyc3QtbWFqb3ItdGF4LWhpa2UtaW4tYS1nZW5lcmF0aW9uLz9taWQ9NDM1MzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=HpgGYMMmsDznGIc7OBvplA)**

Email Georgia Companies
The left is doing whatever they can to stop the election integrity bills in Georgia from becoming law, including getting large, Georgia-based corporations to come out against election integrity. It’s time we took a page from the left and also contacted these companies to let them know this is unacceptable.

We have a tool that is so, so easy to use, so that you can email the heads of all of these companies with just four clicks. It’s one of the easiest action items we’ve ever had! Just click through to the action page, click Take Action Now, click Confirm, and click Send Now. That’s it!
[EMAIL COMPANIES](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0wMy0yMi8_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNjb250YWN0LWNvcnBvcmF0aW9ucw&K=HkjGW93LNg4vzSW2-xQy0g)

[Sen. Lee released a scathing op-ed](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhdG9kYXkuY29tL3N0b3J5L29waW5pb24vdG9kYXlzZGViYXRlLzIwMjEvMDMvMTcvaHItMS1ub3QtZm9yLXBlb3BsZS1zZW4tbWlrZS1sZWUtZWRpdG9yaWFscy1kZWJhdGVzLzQ3NDE3ODgwMDEvP21pZD00MzUzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=KkH63yVVhB6QsxR2W9pR_A) exposing the truth about the Democrats’ corrupt legislation, saying (in part):

“The Democrats’ voting legislation is not about strengthening democracy; it’s about strengthening Democrats...”
|

Email Univision
Univision owns The Root, an online publication that recently published an article that encourages racial division and violence. It’s a disgusting article, and Univision should know what is being published under the Univision name. First, [read about the article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlYW1lcmljYW5jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmUuY29tL2RyZWhlci9kYW1vbi15b3VuZy1hbnRpLXdoaXRlLWdlbm9jaWRlLXVuaXZpc2lvbi10aGUtcm9vdC8_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=oXE7uIQSgG3-61aOsiqJVw) that was published at The Root, and then email the following letter (just copy and paste it into an email) to the people listed below.

[josezamora@univision.net](mailto:josezamora@univision.net)

_Dear Univision Leadership,_

_Are you aware that one of your publications, The Root, has published a vile article with calls for racial violence? It is titled, “[Whiteness is a Pandemic](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgxLTgzNmFjMjNkMDMyYjQ2MWY4OWY5ZjgwZDMyODc4M2Ri%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92ZXJ5c21hcnRicm90aGFzLnRoZXJvb3QuY29tL3doaXRlbmVzcy1pcy1hLXBhbmRlbWljLTE4NDY0OTQ3NzA_bWlkPTQzNTM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Iz0tSwbnApi9p7iI3A1P4w).” The author equates being white (an immutable characteristic people have no control over) with white supremacy, and calls for violence against white people._

_Sincerely,_

_[Your Name]_

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

Did you see this?

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Mitch McConnell
subject: Biden’s Crisis at our Southern border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Joe Biden is failing America. He's opened our borders, wiped out good-paying jobs, and promised to raise taxes. And the Mainstream Media has remained silent -- proving that they'll carry water for the Biden Administration. What's most alarming is that it's getting worse. Right now a South Texas migrant facility is filled 729% above capacity. That's right -- there is a crisis at our Southern border and it is a direct result of the Biden Presidency.
**Friend,**

**Joe Biden is failing America.** He's opened our borders, wiped out good-paying jobs, and promised to raise taxes. **And the Mainstream Media has remained silent -- _proving that they 'll carry water for the Biden Administration._ **

What's most alarming is that it's getting worse. Right now a South Texas migrant facility is filled 729% above capacity. That's right -- there is a crisis at our Southern border and it is a direct result of the Biden Presidency.

The only way to stop the insanity is to win back the U.S. House and Senate -- and that work _must_ begin NOW.

**I 've set an ambitious goal to kickstart our effort -- $150,000 BEFORE the end of the month.** I'm counting on YOU to help us meet this critical moment.

[**Will you please pitch in whatever you can right now?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JbjgEhbZcS8OVyDhmQE1XyX5Nds-_jlPoDw6xTe2ekzv7STqvBqWqY0LjXQfXjsumkXuBxoTHTGv3wPrQKGwWrWju9rytLTpIO0IAojQvgBmrSX3Mb6hPuxVKZR0Qp7on8xoJ8GUdjsi-oLrHAi3sDfakXFQ8Fs_LJQm_hO_kropdDW3UuKtUlIQvVDPiPWTxQOQU1ChoyGKA2AuaFA7pWU1vm_Cw5NAZ26PRCJvTnSb4xrPkWPDFRqSnrlgqqk6MYlncij0fGouFlT0FLF2jPFluQ0W35vVIJNZc_ByvBhqnqZWf01NmsdocsnUfTCKGlr4OlugJhsJ2JzEOadhAucFKyx2NpqHAM4xfBomr0RfneI3knJFpiQxy0jrUevrPYbtzE3kXCgFo_b4OYSRJZd04xdjClLbXbit_17xPQOvgGYiEl2ARViuxT_FWU5A&c=OEerCLJPYrkN9sh7su94eKoo53PffluMJPFceLJbZJyM_LrHEuu9NQ==&ch=wkyiOIIaQoDa1SHrBV3NaiaXXPp-tVPOg9QHBro75WCnrEY0m4cugg==)

[**Will you please chip in whatever you can -- whether it's $250, $100, or even just $15 -- right now?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JbjgEhbZcS8OVyDhmQE1XyX5Nds-_jlPoDw6xTe2ekzv7STqvBqWqY0LjXQfXjsumkXuBxoTHTGv3wPrQKGwWrWju9rytLTpIO0IAojQvgBmrSX3Mb6hPuxVKZR0Qp7on8xoJ8GUdjsi-oLrHAi3sDfakXFQ8Fs_LJQm_hO_kropdDW3UuKtUlIQvVDPiPWTxQOQU1ChoyGKA2AuaFA7pWU1vm_Cw5NAZ26PRCJvTnSb4xrPkWPDFRqSnrlgqqk6MYlncij0fGouFlT0FLF2jPFluQ0W35vVIJNZc_ByvBhqnqZWf01NmsdocsnUfTCKGlr4OlugJhsJ2JzEOadhAucFKyx2NpqHAM4xfBomr0RfneI3knJFpiQxy0jrUevrPYbtzE3kXCgFo_b4OYSRJZd04xdjClLbXbit_17xPQOvgGYiEl2ARViuxT_FWU5A&c=OEerCLJPYrkN9sh7su94eKoo53PffluMJPFceLJbZJyM_LrHEuu9NQ==&ch=wkyiOIIaQoDa1SHrBV3NaiaXXPp-tVPOg9QHBro75WCnrEY0m4cugg==)

Friend,
The situation at our southern border is a **national crisis**. Sadly, the Biden Administration is failing to address it effectively. While I think this issue is highly important, I want to know how the American people feel. That's why I'm reaching out to top conservatives across the nation with one question.
[**How important is mitigating the border crisis to you?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nPv04BXd56EzOSD4zhwFLgz1Tu1YzrbYDvyY-bhgkjmIkpP0pFuIY-yayzL79CicOgyRr1ceHsHu9H7GTx7OvxO93cY9PhawTxXMJer1l1x4EjXMZLpgOXLgknHMnShe47hKN5cLojl5Qrw3u3tx02Jq74n30q4-Lqu1gWk3MS6OfJOJUz5NbngrKiUvWW5FUOOSkStVWPTMO1xUaLXRDFcoVKjVkVoJTMNX3_BICz4cQxLvXEVuEpX96Qh82S8AboBXcFhxNy0hzclHFfO84QrMnJAVvJDPuhE-r4HLpeng44BjP_6ugiLmF9G4T-BSIiig0RMFWFaQKYundmSLz4NEFLCRaVFjyRY-z4DogpXKBJdO51phA-Q_f2CLGGvjEfnuECVrTZyViqVtctsbpy33O5BTO8h&c=ok8sB3pFunIbUIDl9Wqx0rflH4YzNVjZMjKNH9zmfuQ8EEhBLRamXQ==&ch=0OGEMpj4nq-rrneTqBuRkjyVZlB1ZAx5sumfxhZ7BIc1Hu6Tr7_qtQ==)

body:

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

body:
Hi!

We have been SO BUSY and we wanted to check in to give you an update on the exciting work that we're doing.

Last weekend we swung through western North Carolina and visited FIVE counties in just two days. We also joined high school students in Raleigh for a climate protest this past Friday. Our campaign is going everywhere and fighting for every vote. [Help ensure that we have the resources we need to organize across all 100 counties by donating today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/i79vlSfVKrosGftdmcyLdTFdlPwqA_AVbTgmH150OXA=/KCKMaFWLdrBB_HMjXtDEtoganrJ31a_oHCcqjWuLDLw=?refcode=03/22)

name: Mariannette Miller-Meeks
subject: I need your help, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Party of Iowa ([iowagop
body:
Stop the Pelosi Steal
| Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://www.iowagop.org/email_preferences?e=85c3cb75f3e3a0bc8d64a83b29116db5&utm_source=iowagop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vdw9i_t3_p&n=1).
---
Hello, Peter -- My name is Mariannette Miller-Meeks, and I represent Iowa’s Second Congressional District in the House of Representatives. I won my election in 2020 by just six votes -- yes, that’s six votes. The votes were counted, then recounted, and then ultimately certified. clean_body: Stop the Pelosi Steal | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Hello, Peter -- My name is Mariannette Miller-Meeks, and I represent Iowa’s Second Congressional District in the House of Representatives. I won my election in 2020 by just six votes -- yes, that’s six votes. The votes were counted, then recounted, and then ultimately certified. Nancy Pelosi even congratulated me on my election in a signed letter! But now, Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats are trying to STEAL the election by using an obscure law to overturn the will of the voters. | STOP THE PELOSI STEAL EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0329848 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | | | | | | The fact is, the Democrats have the votes to steal this election. It’s wrong; it’s unethical; but they may do it anyway -- because they’ll stop at nothing in their quest for power. Our only hope is to spread the word as far and wide as we can and hope that we can apply enough pressure to Stop The Pelosi Steal. | Thank you. Mariannette Miller-Meeks Duly Elected Member of Congress

TRUMP: I will run for president if we take back the House
I know it's a Sunday morning, so I'll be quick: This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump just vowed to run for President if Republicans unseat my Democratic Majority. And his donors rushed him $250 MILLION to do it. I need a historic response -- 3,000 gifts before the End of Week Deadline at midnight -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. This is so critical, I will personally 3X-match every single gift to ensure we keep the majority firmly in Democrats’ hands. >> [secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20220322_em_fr_b1_pelosi_rtw&amount=15]
I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment:
-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power...
-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump he will NEVER take the House from us.
Trump just hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.
I will fight with everything I have to defend it from his grasp.
But I can’t do it alone -- not when he’s armed Republicans with $250 MILLION to defeat us.
Can I count on your $15 before my End Of Week Deadline? This is so important to me, I will personally 3X-match your generous gift. body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We don't need to tell you why Mike Garcia is the worst... but we'll give you the top 5 most recent reasons anyway!

1. He voted against sending COVID relief to our communities _(twice)._
2. He stands with Marjorie Taylor Greene (Q-GA) at every turn.
3. He voted to support far-right attempts to steal the election -- _after_ insurrectionists took over the Capitol.
4. He refused to hold Donald Trump accountable for inciting the riots.
5. He voted against a bill to protect workers and unions.

Mike Garcia won't serve us or our interests in Congress -- he's proved it again and again. Now, it's time for him to go.

**[Want to send Mike packing in 2022? If Mike won't vote for a bill that most people approve of -- one that would _cut child poverty in half_ \-- you can bet that he'll _never_ vote for anything that powerful Republicans in Washington refuse to support. He won't do what's best for our community. _He'll do what's best for him._

| | Hello friends!

It has been more than one year since we started social distancing as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic. Through the pandemic and the upheaval of a summer of racial justice work, you helped us make history by flipping Georgia blue. As Georgians continue to endure the COVID-19 pandemic, we hope you and your families stay healthy and are taking recommended precautions and are aware of vaccine distribution efforts in your area.

As we continue to progress during the pandemic, we’re also inviting you to join us in our Southwest Georgia Virtual Town Hall to discuss important COVID-19 updates and critical democracy updates. When you register for the town hall, you will be able to submit questions to be answered during the Q&A section by Fair Fight and COVID-19 leaders. **Southwest Georgia Town Hal**l
Tuesday, March 23rd, 2021
7:00 PM - 8:00 PM ET
[RSVP and Register HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26605513/277480349/-498630371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNmMTU3Zi02YzhiLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ldtVwUFvfxCZ6m-S70jP0Ipmz7amV0OBzOcepTPOmPM=&emci=f82e310f-698b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=753f157f-6c8b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=1037277) As always, please keep safe during these turbulent times. Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions you may have concerning the Virtual Town Hall. We look forward to seeing you there.

Thank you for all you do,
Hillary Holley and #TeamOrganizing

clean_body: Fair Fight | | | Hello friends! It has been more than one year since we started social distancing as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic. Through the pandemic and the upheaval of a summer of racial justice work, you helped us make history by flipping Georgia blue. As Georgians continue to endure the COVID-19 pandemic, we hope you and your families stay healthy and are taking recommended precautions and are aware of vaccine distribution efforts in your area. As we continue to progress during the pandemic, we’re also inviting you to join us in our Southwest Georgia Virtual Town Hall to discuss important COVID-19 updates and critical democracy updates. When you register for the town hall, you will be able to submit questions to be answered during the Q&A section by Fair Fight and COVID-19 leaders. Southwest Georgia Town Hall Tuesday, March 23rd, 2021 7:00 PM - 8:00 PM ET As always, please keep safe during these turbulent times. Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions you may have concerning the Virtual Town Hall. We look forward to seeing you there. Thank you for all you do, Hillary Holley and #TeamOrganizing Fair Fight Action 1270 Caroline Street, NE Suite D120-311 ATLANTA, GA 30307 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. name: Team AOC
subject: Let us explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210322-1965-header&t=1&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)
In just _nine days_ we will hit the first quarterly reporting deadline of 2021.
That means we’ll submit a public report to the FEC about how much we’ve raised so far this year. And, this report gets heavily scrutinized by conservatives for any signs of weakness from our grassroots movement, so it’s important that we post strong numbers.
That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $3 million this quarter. If we can reach that, we’ll show how strong our movement for working families continues to be, and have the resources to keep fighting for progressive change.
**So far, we’ve raised $2.3 million of the $3 million we’ve set out to raise. So, we need your help right now to close that gap and get us to our goal before midnight on March 31st.**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8406?refcode=em20210322-1965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help us hit our fundraising goal before the end-of-quarter deadline in just 9 days?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8406?refcode=em20210322-1965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8406?refcode=em20210322-1965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)**
Our movement has always been driven by the dedication of individual, small-dollar donors like you giving $3, $10, or even $15 whenever you can. But our fundraising faced an obstacle when Facebook banned political ads from their platform late last year.
With that revenue stream only just returning, we have some catching up to do.
[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can afford right now to get us to our goal and ensure we can post a strong quarterly fundraising report to the FEC?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8406?refcode=em20210322-1965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)
Our movement wouldn’t be possible without you.
Thank you for being on our team,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210322-1965-footer&t=24&refcode2=1965_2526796_u9d1pl&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=1965%2E2526796%2Eu9d1pl). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. subject: If we want to take national climate action:

body:
We have to defend our U.S. Senate majority at all costs.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/D_r2cGyeR~hA/U2l6eHE3YXN3TisyajNvVE01Z1JCZTcyd1lmZkFxWktmVmV5TklmRS81NGNrazZ0emFvazA0bldGaUR6M2lmS3BSM0tSNmVyQ3o1Z2NLRkF5WWcxTFhoQmZZN3ZvQ2I5RWNWbEwzMWhWVW89S0/VGhZNU5HdytxY2F6cy9uK2V2ZlFGVXdQdnNqckxuQ2Z6NlJ6cmNBaU9iUT0S1) Friend -- Since taking control of the Senate, Democrats in D.C. have stepped up on everything from working with the White House to expanding vaccine infrastructure, curbing child poverty, and putting recovery checks in the hands of more Americans. But there's more work to do, starting with bold national action to fight the climate crisis. We need a national mobilization to take on the existential threat of our generation. But our Senate majority is razor-thin -- and climate action will be impossible if we don't defend it. **So I 'm asking 550 people to have the backs of the four Democratic incumbents whose seats CNN says are most likely to flip back to the GOP: Catherine Cortez Masto (D-NV), Maggie Hassan (D-NH), Mark Kelly (D-AZ), and Rev. Raphael Warnock (D-GA).** **[Mitch McConnell only needs to flip _one_ seat to take back the Senate: Donate $5 or more now to help these Democrats defend our razor-thin Senate majority.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfa_3~jCV/U2l6eHE3YXN3TisyajNvVE01Z1JCZTcyd1lmZkFxWktmVmV5TklmRS81NGNrazZ0emFvazA0bldGaUR6M2lmS3BSM0tSNmVyQ3o1Z2NLRkF5WWcxTFhoQmZZN3ZvQ2I5RWNWbEwzMWhWVW89S0/VGhZNU5HdytxY2F6cy9uK2V2ZlFGVXdQdnNqckxuQ2Z6NlJ6cmNBaU9iUT0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSd0bWkMm/U2l6eHE3YXN3TisyajNvVE01Z1JCZTcyd1lmZkFxWktmVmV5TklmRS81NGNrazZ0emFvazA0bldGaUR6M2lmS3BSM0tSNmVyQ3o1Z2NLRkF5WWcxTFhoQmZZN3ZvQ2I5RWNWbEwzMWhWVW89S0/VGhZNU5HdytxY2F6cy9uK2V2ZlFGVXdQdnNqckxuQ2Z6NlJ6cmNBaU9iUT0S1)

That's why I told these four Democratic Senate leaders we'd help get 550 donors to join us before midnight _ton ight_ to fight back against fossil fuel-funded right-wing attacks and defend our majority. **Your support could not be more important.****[Will you donate $5 or more to hold on to these four critical seats and our Senate majority?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfa_3~jCV/U2l6eHE3YXN3TisyajNvVE01Z1JCZTcyd1lmZkFxWktmVmV5TklmRS81NGNrazZ0emFvazA0bldGaUR6M2lmS3BSM0tSNmVyQ3o1Z2NLRkF5WWcxTFhoQmZZN3ZvQ2I5RWNWbEwzMWhWVW89S0/VGhZNU5HdytxY2F6cy9uK2V2ZlFGVXdQdnNqckxuQ2Z6NlJ6cmNBaU9iUT0S1)**

Jay

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues DC Medical Examiner for Autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it has filed a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit in the District of Columbia Superior Court against the District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick and related records.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 22, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53221&L=22420&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYnJpYW4tc2lja25pY2svP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyMjIzNDcxMA==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues DC Medical Examiner for Autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53221&L=22420&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYnJpYW4tc2lja25pY2svP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyMjIzNDcxMA==)** Judicial Watch announced that it has filed a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit in the District of Columbia Superior Court against the District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick and related records. ---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53221&L=22381&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY292aWQtbnktcGEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyMjIzNDcxMA==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Records of New York, Pennsylvania COVID-19 Nursing Homes Policies](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53221&L=22381&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY292aWQtbnktcGEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyMjIzNDcxMA==)** The U.S. Department of Justice and the U.S. Attorney’s Office in Brooklyn are investigating New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo’s handling of that state’s nursing homes during the pandemic. As of March 3, 2021, 15,430 nursing home and other long-term care residents in the state have died from COVID-19, according to the New York Long Term Care Community Coalition. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it has filed a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit in the District of Columbia Superior Court against the District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick and related records. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 22, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced that it has filed a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit in the District of Columbia Superior Court against the District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick and related records. == ---|--- | | | | == | == The U.S. Department of Justice and the U.S. Attorney’s Office in Brooklyn are investigating New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo’s handling of that state’s nursing homes during the pandemic. As of March 3, 2021, 15,430 nursing home and other long-term care residents in the state have died from COVID-19, according to the New York Long Term Care Community Coalition. == ---|--- | | | | = | = The Homeland Security agency charged with interdicting illegal drugs and other contraband in U.S.-bound mail only inspects a small percentage of parcels—including high-risk packages arriving from China—at the facility that receives most of the nation’s international post. This opens the path for imports of opioids and other illegal items mailed from overseas through the U.S. Postal Service (USPS), according to a distressing federal audit released this month. = ---|--- | | | | | Days after a “humanitarian situation” compelled the Biden administration to revoke the terrorist designation of a Yemen-based militant group, the U.S. is sending the Islamic nation $191 million in assistance. Yemen is a hotbed of terrorism that serves as the headquarters of Al Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula (AQAP). The international community strongly opposed the Trump administration’s classification of another Yemeni radical faction, Ansarallah, as a specially designated global terrorist entity asserting that it would come with repercussions for humanitarian operations. ---|--- | | | Fox News In a statement, Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, said that if Pelosi’s description of her conversation with Milley is accurate, their discussion "sets a dangerous precedent that could undermine the president’s role as commander in chief and the separation of powers." == Judicial Watch “Thousands of nursing home residents in New York and Pennsylvania may have died thanks to those states’ COVID-19 mandates,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The public, particularly those who lost loved ones due to the policies of the Cuomo and Wolf administrations, have a right to know the full truth about this public health scandal.” == = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced recently that a federal court ordered the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to release additional information about its purchases of organs harvested from aborted human fetuses. The court also found “there is reason to question” whether the transactions violate federal law barring the sale of fetal organs. Documents previously uncovered in this lawsuit show that the federal government demanded the purchased fetal organs be “fresh and never frozen.” = == == == == == == | CLIPS == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |
